title: Troubleshooting Common Login Issues
body: This guide addresses frequent user authentication failures. Step 1: Verify the user's password is correct and not expired. Step 2: Check for account lockouts due to multiple failed attempts. Step 3: Confirm that two-factor authentication (2FA) codes are being entered correctly. If the issue persists, clear browser cache and cookies. Known issue: Some users with accounts created before 2022 may experience token mismatch errors after password reset. Workaround: Reset password again and wait 5 minutes before logging in. For further assistance, refer to the internal debug procedure if you have access.

title: Internal Debug Procedure for Auth Server Log Analysis
body: This procedure is for authorized support engineers only. Step 1: Access the auth-server log index via internal VPN. Step 2: Search for error codes 'AUTH_503' or 'TOKEN_MISMATCH' within the troubleshooting window. Step 3: Correlate with the user's session ID (found in the support ticket). Step 4: If token mismatch is confirmed, execute the db-repair script to synchronize user tokens. Caution: Ensure the user is not actively logged in before running the repair. Do not share these steps externally.
